courses.title: React Masterclass
courses.longDescription: Master modern React from the ground up. You will learn hooks deeply, manage global state with Redux Toolkit, handle async flows, and build production-grade UIs.

courses.title: Node.js & Express
courses.longDescription: Go deep into Node.js internals and build scalable REST APIs with Express. Covers middleware, auth, file uploads, and deployment.

courses.title: Full Stack MERN
courses.longDescription: Build complete full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js. You will ship three real-world projects by the end.
